_meta.note: Phase A tier ranges for MVP lookup. Tier 4 covers canonical sample S3-110 (1980-05-22).

default.essenceEn: Your S3 number reflects how your energy expresses in the world.
default.essenceZh: 你的 S3 编号映照你的能量如何在现实中表达。
default.noteEn: The full report expands your 12-tier vibration expression in depth.
default.noteZh: 更完整的 12 阶振动等级解读将在完整报告中展开。
default.displayRule: Show raw S3 number first, then use tier when available.

tiers.essenceEn: Your energy expresses through steady, foundational rhythms.
tiers.essenceZh: 你的能量通过稳定、扎根的节奏表达。

tiers.essenceEn: Your energy builds momentum through consistent expression.
tiers.essenceZh: 你的能量通过持续的表达积累动量。

tiers.essenceEn: Your energy expands outward as you find your expressive range.
tiers.essenceZh: 当你找到自己的表达幅度，能量向外扩展。

tiers.essenceEn: Your energy expresses with amplified intensity — you feel life vividly and move through experience with depth. This tier invites conscious channeling rather than overwhelm.
tiers.essenceZh: 你的能量以放大的强度表达——你鲜活地感受生命，并深度经历体验。此层级邀请有意识引导，而非被淹没。
tiers.expressionEn: Intensity, depth, and vivid emotional resonance.
tiers.expressionZh: 强度、深度与鲜活的情感共振。
tiers.growthEdgeEn: Learning to channel intensity without burning out or dominating.
tiers.growthEdgeZh: 学习引导强度，而不耗尽或被强度支配。

tiers.essenceEn: Your energy radiates naturally when aligned with purpose.
tiers.essenceZh: 当与目的对齐，你的能量自然辐射。

tiers.essenceEn: Your energy seeks harmony between inner truth and outer expression.
tiers.essenceZh: 你的能量寻求内在真实与外在表达之间的谐振。

tiers.essenceEn: Your energy surges in cycles of activation and integration.
tiers.essenceZh: 你的能量在激活与整合的周期中涌流。

tiers.essenceEn: Your energy refines itself through discernment and selective expression.
tiers.essenceZh: 你的能量通过辨识与选择性表达而精炼。

tiers.essenceEn: Your energy lifts experience toward higher perspective.
tiers.essenceZh: 你的能量将体验提升至更高视角。

tiers.essenceEn: Your energy illuminates paths for yourself and others.
tiers.essenceZh: 你的能量为自己与他人照亮道路。

tiers.essenceEn: Your energy moves beyond ordinary limits when consciously directed.
tiers.essenceZh: 当被有意识引导，你的能量超越寻常界限。

tiers.essenceEn: Your energy reaches peak expressive resonance — integration is essential.
tiers.essenceZh: 你的能量达到峰值表达共振——整合至关重要。
